pm_decision_extract.reasoning_summary: PSTV surged from 7.56 (prior close) to 14.25 (trigger open) on 2025-03-04 private placement announcement ($15M for CNS cancer therapies). By decision timestamp, stock collapsed to 8.75 EOD (-38.6% from peak, -53.9% over 5 days). Narrative Agent confirms catalyst is concrete and specific (0.85 specificity score); SEC 8-K filing and GlobeNewswire press release provide hard-to-fake corroboration. Alt-Data Verification Agent reports narrative_contradicted verdict: the positive financing narrative is contradicted by severe price decline and deep fundamental distress (net margin -429.43%, ROA -1.37%, 4 consecutive quarters of negative EPS). Surge-Short Agent recommends short entry at 0.5% position size. Risk Agent confirms no hard-veto conditions tripped (all §5.13 conditions pass). Structural absence of biotech-specific alt-data (clinical trial registry, FDA filings, patent activity) relative to CNS cancer therapy narrative is bear-thesis signal per §13.6 SOFT_REASONING asymmetric absence rule. The private placement is dilutive financing typical of cash-strapped biotech, not value creation. Macro regime (Overheat/Moderately Restrictive) argues for strict quality discipline. Preponderance of evidence supports short thesis: (1) surge dynamic showing exhaustion (price collapsed 38.6% from peak by decision timestamp), (2) narrative-vs-evidence divergence (positive financing contradicted by negative price action and fundamental distress), (3) structural absence of sector-expected clinical-stage corroboration, (4) negative fundamentals with no visible path to profitability. Conviction is medium due to missing fundamental data and incomplete alt-data adapters, but evidence coherence is sufficient for surge-short entry at fixed 0.5% position size per §4.8.

If biotech_clinical_adapter returns evidence of Phase 2/3 enrollment progress or FDA milestone achievement
If analyst sentiment shifts materially (new Buy/Strong Buy ratings post-announcement)
If stock stabilizes above 12.00 and volume normalizes, suggesting institutional support
If private placement terms are revealed to be non-dilutive or include significant warrant coverage

§4.8 surge_short_entry_decision_framework — preponderance of evidence supports short: (i) surge exhaustion (price collapsed 38.6% from peak), (ii) narrative-vs-evidence divergence (positive financing contradicted by negative price action), (iii) structural absence of sector-expected clinical-stage corroboration, (iv) negative fundamentals with no path to profitability
§4.8 position_size_validation — NEW surge_short entry: position_size_pct = 0.005 (0.5%) per mechanical rule; no override needed
decision_log: 2025-03-06T09:30:00-05:00 — PM Agent initialized for PSTV surge_short candidate
Step 1: Hard-veto evaluation (§5.13) — Risk Agent output consumed; all 5 conditions (a)-(e) evaluated; none tripped; candidate passes mechanical guardrails

Step 2: Upstream agent synthesis — Narrative Agent (verdict=supported, specificity=0.85), Alt-Data Verify Agent (verdict=narrative_contradicted), Surge-Short Agent (recommended_action=short), Risk Agent (veto=false)

Step 3: Preponderance-of-evidence reasoning (§13.6 SOFT_REASONING) — Surge dynamic exhaustion: price collapsed 38.6% from peak (14.25 to 8.75) by decision timestamp; volume elevated (2.53x 20-day avg) but declining; intraday crash from peak indicates momentum exhaustion

Step 4: Narrative-vs-evidence divergence — Public narrative: positive financing ($15M for CNS cancer therapies); hard-to-fake corroboration: SEC 8-K filing + GlobeNewswire press release; contradicting evidence: severe price decline (-53.9% over 5 days), deep fundamental distress (net margin -429.43%, ROA -1.37%), 4 consecutive quarters of negative EPS

Step 5: Structural absence reasoning (asymmetric absence rule, §13.6) — Expected biotech-sector evidence: clinical trial registry data, FDA filing index, patent activity, R&D expense disclosure; actual evidence in packet: none (biotech_clinical_adapter not wired, fundamental_snapshot status=insufficient_evidence); this structural absence relative to CNS cancer therapy narrative is bear-thesis input for surge_short

Step 6: Fundamental assessment — Negative PE (-0.83), negative ROA (-1.37%), extreme negative net margin (-429.43%), 4 consecutive quarters of negative EPS; no visible path to profitability; private placement is dilutive financing, not value creation
Step 7: Macro regime context — Overheat/Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2); equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution; unfavorable backdrop for speculative biotech

Step 8: Conviction assessment — Medium confidence due to missing fundamental data and incomplete alt-data adapters; however, evidence coherence is sufficient: surge exhaustion + narrative-vs-evidence divergence + structural absence + negative fundamentals all point in same direction (bear thesis)
Step 9: Position sizing (§4.8) — NEW surge_short entry: position_size_pct = 0.005 (0.5%) per mechanical rule; no override needed; sleeve cap headroom = 10% - 0.5% = 9.5% remaining
Step 10: Decision finalization — decision=short, position_size_pct=0.005, execution_plan.order_type='T+1 next-open', execution_plan.side='sell_to_open', execution_plan.size_pct_of_portfolio=0.005
Step 11: Audit record populated with rule_version, frozen_rules_file, agent_prompt_version, evidence_packet_hash

narrative_event.reasoning_summary: CATALYST IDENTIFICATION: Plus Therapeutics (PSTV) announced on 2025-03-04 (published 2025-03-04T19:06:00 UTC) a private placement of approximately $15.0 million in gross proceeds. The announcement is concrete and specific: named dollar amount ($15M), stated use case (advance CNS cancer therapies, meet near-term milestones), and confirmed by SEC 8-K filing (accession 0001193125-25-045305, filed 2025-03-04, items 1.01/3.02/9.01). CATALYST TYPE: Financing event (private placement). SPECIFICITY ASSESSMENT: The catalyst scores 0.85 on specificity [0.0, 1.0]. The claim is concrete: specific dollar amount, explicit therapeutic focus (CNS cancer), and SEC filing confirmation. No vague buzzwords ('AI pivot', 'blockchain', 'synergies'). The company's stated use of proceeds is operationally grounded (advance therapies, meet milestones). PRICE ACTION CONTEXT: Stock declined 53.9% over 5 days (return_5d_pct = -53.9474) with elevated relative volume (2.529x 20-day average). The 8-K filing date (2025-03-04) precedes the decision timestamp (2025-03-06 09:30 ET) by ~2 trading days, placing the catalyst in the near-term narrative window. SECTOR-AWARE REASONING: PSTV is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company (per news excerpt: 'clinical-stage pharmaceutical company'). For biotech/pharma, expected corroborating evidence includes: FDA filings (IND/NDA/ANDA), clinical trial registry entries, R&D expense disclosure, and financing announcements. The packet contains: (1) SEC 8-K confirmation of financing (T1 source), (2) news release via GlobeNewswire (T2 source), (3) analyst ratings stable at 2 Strong Buy / 3 Buy as of 2025-03-01 (per fmp_sentiment, no recent downgrade). ABSENCE PATTERN: No clinical trial registry data, no FDA filing details, no R&D expense breakdown in fundamental_snapshot (which is marked insufficient_evidence). However, these absences are NOT contradictory to the financing narrative — they reflect data gaps in the packet, not structural absence relative to the company's actual sector narrative. A clinical-stage biotech announcing a financing round is sector-normal; the absence of trial-registry detail in THIS packet does not invalidate the financing catalyst itself. NARRATIVE DIVERGENCE: NDI is null (insufficient sources for cross-source disagreement scoring per §23.2). Only one news source (GlobeNewswire) is present in the packet within the cutoff window. No competing narrative detected. VALUATION CONTEXT: Valuation snapshot shows negative PE (-0.8271), negative ROA (-1.371), and extreme negative net margin (-429.43%), consistent with a pre-revenue or early-stage clinical company. The financing is consistent with this profile: capital raise to fund development, not a response to operational profitability. ALTERNATIVE DATA: Wikipedia pageviews for 'List_of_downloadable_PlayStation_Portable_games' (unrelated to PSTV ticker) show no spike correlated to the financing announcement. This reflects adapter misconfiguration (ticker PSTV mapped to PSP gaming article, not the pharmaceutical company). The absence of relevant alt-data is a data-quality gap, not a signal against the catalyst. CONCLUSION: The catalyst is CONCRETE, SPECIFIC, and SUPPORTED by SEC filing + news release. The financing narrative is internally consistent with the company's sector (biotech) and financial profile (pre-revenue, capital-intensive). The stock's 54% decline over 5 days is NOT explained by the financing announcement itself (which is positive for capital availability) but likely reflects broader market sentiment, sector headwinds, or pre-existing concerns. The catalyst is real and specific; the price action suggests market skepticism about the company's prospects despite the financing.
invalidation_conditions: If the 8-K filing is later revealed to be erroneous or withdrawn (no evidence of this in packet)
If the $15M private placement is cancelled or materially reduced (no evidence in packet)
If the announced use of proceeds (CNS cancer therapy advancement) is contradicted by subsequent filings or management commentary (not yet available as of decision_timestamp)

narrative_event.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: The evidence packet's alternative_data_features block is misconfigured for PSTV: the Wikipedia pageviews adapter is returning data for a PlayStation Portable gaming article, not the pharmaceutical company. This reflects a ticker-mapping error upstream, not a weakness in the narrative agent's reasoning. The agent correctly identifies this as uninformative and does not weight it in the catalyst assessment. The fundamental_snapshot block is marked insufficient_evidence, which prevents sector-aware reasoning about cash burn and runway — a material gap for a pre-revenue biotech. The information_integrity_assessment block is a placeholder (pollution-defense layer unimplemented in v1), so the agent cannot assess whether the financing announcement is subject to coordinated campaign risk or bot-like amplification. These are schema/adapter limitations, not agent reasoning weaknesses.

alt_data_verify.reasoning_summary: PSTV is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company (biotech sector per news narrative). The primary narrative is a $15M private placement announced 2025-03-04 to advance CNS cancer therapies. Hard-to-fake corroboration: (1) SEC 8-K filing exists and is dated 2025-03-04, matching the news announcement; (2) GlobeNewswire press release (T1 source) confirms the financing event; (3) analyst sentiment shows 2 Strong Buy + 3 Buy ratings as of 2025-03-01, consistent with pre-announcement bullish positioning. However, structural absence of sector-expected alt-data is notable: (a) no clinical trial registry rows (biotech should have FDA/ClinicalTrials.gov footprint); (b) no GitHub activity (irrelevant for pharma, correctly absent); (c) no insider Form 4 activity in 90 days (neutral, not contradictory); (d) Wikipedia pageviews are for 'PlayStation Portable games' article, not PSTV company — this is a data-mapping artifact and not informative about the company. The price action (5-day -53.95%, 20-day -72%) is severe and contradicts the positive narrative of a financing event. This suggests either (i) the financing was dilutive/poorly received, (ii) the market was already pricing in distress before the announcement, or (iii) the announcement itself triggered a sell-off (possibly due to terms, dilution, or market conditions). Valuation metrics show deep losses (net margin -429%, ROA -1.37%), consistent with a pre-revenue or early-stage biotech. The filing and news are authentic and corroborated, but the price action and fundamental distress indicate the market is not treating the financing as a positive catalyst. Absence of clinical trial data is informative for a biotech: a legitimate clinical-stage company should have trial registry entries, but none are present in the packet (adapter not wired). This is a genuinely silent absence, not an informative one.
invalidation_conditions: If the 8-K filing is later revealed to be fraudulent or the private placement terms are materially misrepresented
If the company's clinical trials are halted or fail post-decision
If the financing is cancelled or the funds are not received
If insider selling accelerates post-announcement (Form 4 data post-cutoff)

alt_data_verify.narrative_price_gap_rationale: The public narrative is positive (company secures $15M financing to advance CNS cancer therapies). Hard-to-fake corroboration exists: SEC 8-K filing and GlobeNewswire press release both confirm the event. However, price action is severely negative (-53.95% in 5 days, -72% in 20 days), and fundamental metrics show deep distress (net margin -429%, ROA -1.37%). The market is pricing the financing as dilutive or insufficient to address underlying business deterioration. Analyst sentiment (2 Strong Buy, 3 Buy) is pre-announcement and does not reflect post-event repricing. The gap between positive narrative (financing secured) and negative price action (sharp decline) is high and suggests either (i) market skepticism about financing terms, (ii) pre-existing distress that financing does not address, or (iii) dilution concerns. Absence of clinical trial data (sector-expected for biotech) is a structural gap but not a direct contradiction.
alt_data_verify.adapter_selection_reason: Default fallback adapter selected due to no industry-specific adapter wired for biotech. Wikipedia pageviews returned data but is not relevant to PSTV company (data-mapping artifact). biotech_clinical_adapter not available.
alt_data_verify.hard_to_fake_signal_summary: SEC 8-K filing (2025-03-04, accession 0001193125-25-045305) and GlobeNewswire press release (T1 source) both confirm $15M private placement announcement. These are hard-to-fake primary sources. However, price action (-53.95% in 5 days) and fundamental distress (net margin -429%) strongly contradict the positive narrative. The contradiction is not in the event itself (financing is real) but in market reception (price decline suggests dilution or insufficient remedy for underlying problems).

surge_short.reasoning_summary: PSTV surged from ~7.56 (prior close) to 14.25 (trigger open) on 2025-03-04 private placement announcement ($15M gross proceeds for CNS cancer therapies). By decision timestamp (2025-03-06 09:30 ET), stock had already collapsed to 8.75 EOD (-38.6% from surge peak), with 5-day return of -53.9%. The catalyst (private placement) is real and SEC-filed, but the bear thesis rests on structural absence of corroborating evidence for a clinical-stage biotech: (1) fundamental_snapshot is entirely null — no quarterly financials available despite mandatory SEC reporting; (2) alternative_data_features show no biotech-specific signals (clinical trial registry, FDA filings, patent activity) — only Wikipedia pageviews for an unrelated PlayStation article; (3) valuation metrics are deeply negative (PE -0.83, net margin -429.43%, ROA -1.37%), indicating severe cash burn; (4) four consecutive quarters of negative EPS with no path to profitability visible; (5) analyst sentiment unchanged (2 SB, 3-5 B) despite the surge, suggesting no institutional conviction. The private placement itself is a dilutive financing event typical of cash-strapped biotech, not value creation. The surge appears to be momentum/narrative-driven rather than fundamental improvement. Macro regime (Overheat/Moderately Restrictive) argues for strict quality discipline. The structural absence of expected biotech corroboration (clinical data, regulatory filings, IP evidence) relative to the company's CNS cancer therapy narrative is a bear-thesis signal under §13.6 SOFT_REASONING.
invalidation_conditions: If fundamental_snapshot becomes available and shows positive operating cash flow or path to profitability
If alternative_data_features (biotech_clinical_adapter) returns evidence of Phase 2/3 enrollment progress or FDA milestone achievement
If analyst sentiment shifts materially (e.g., new Buy/Strong Buy ratings post-announcement)
If stock stabilizes above 12.00 and volume normalizes, suggesting institutional support

pm.reasoning_summary: PSTV surged from 7.56 (prior close) to 14.25 (trigger open) on 2025-03-04 private placement announcement ($15M for CNS cancer therapies). By decision timestamp, stock collapsed to 8.75 EOD (-38.6% from peak, -53.9% over 5 days). Narrative Agent confirms catalyst is concrete and specific (0.85 specificity score); SEC 8-K filing and GlobeNewswire press release provide hard-to-fake corroboration. Alt-Data Verification Agent reports narrative_contradicted verdict: the positive financing narrative is contradicted by severe price decline and deep fundamental distress (net margin -429.43%, ROA -1.37%, 4 consecutive quarters of negative EPS). Surge-Short Agent recommends short entry at 0.5% position size. Risk Agent confirms no hard-veto conditions tripped (all §5.13 conditions pass). Structural absence of biotech-specific alt-data (clinical trial registry, FDA filings, patent activity) relative to CNS cancer therapy narrative is bear-thesis signal per §13.6 SOFT_REASONING asymmetric absence rule. The private placement is dilutive financing typical of cash-strapped biotech, not value creation. Macro regime (Overheat/Moderately Restrictive) argues for strict quality discipline. Preponderance of evidence supports short thesis: (1) surge dynamic showing exhaustion (price collapsed 38.6% from peak by decision timestamp), (2) narrative-vs-evidence divergence (positive financing contradicted by negative price action and fundamental distress), (3) structural absence of sector-expected clinical-stage corroboration, (4) negative fundamentals with no visible path to profitability. Conviction is medium due to missing fundamental data and incomplete alt-data adapters, but evidence coherence is sufficient for surge-short entry at fixed 0.5% position size per §4.8.

§4.8 surge_short_entry_decision_framework — preponderance of evidence supports short: (i) surge exhaustion (price collapsed 38.6% from peak), (ii) narrative-vs-evidence divergence (positive financing contradicted by negative price action), (iii) structural absence of sector-expected clinical-stage corroboration, (iv) negative fundamentals with no path to profitability
§4.8 position_size_validation — NEW surge_short entry: position_size_pct = 0.005 (0.5%) per mechanical rule; no override needed
decision_log: 2025-03-06T09:30:00-05:00 — PM Agent initialized for PSTV surge_short candidate
Step 1: Hard-veto evaluation (§5.13) — Risk Agent output consumed; all 5 conditions (a)-(e) evaluated; none tripped; candidate passes mechanical guardrails

Step 2: Upstream agent synthesis — Narrative Agent (verdict=supported, specificity=0.85), Alt-Data Verify Agent (verdict=narrative_contradicted), Surge-Short Agent (recommended_action=short), Risk Agent (veto=false)

Step 3: Preponderance-of-evidence reasoning (§13.6 SOFT_REASONING) — Surge dynamic exhaustion: price collapsed 38.6% from peak (14.25 to 8.75) by decision timestamp; volume elevated (2.53x 20-day avg) but declining; intraday crash from peak indicates momentum exhaustion

Step 4: Narrative-vs-evidence divergence — Public narrative: positive financing ($15M for CNS cancer therapies); hard-to-fake corroboration: SEC 8-K filing + GlobeNewswire press release; contradicting evidence: severe price decline (-53.9% over 5 days), deep fundamental distress (net margin -429.43%, ROA -1.37%), 4 consecutive quarters of negative EPS

Step 5: Structural absence reasoning (asymmetric absence rule, §13.6) — Expected biotech-sector evidence: clinical trial registry data, FDA filing index, patent activity, R&D expense disclosure; actual evidence in packet: none (biotech_clinical_adapter not wired, fundamental_snapshot status=insufficient_evidence); this structural absence relative to CNS cancer therapy narrative is bear-thesis input for surge_short

Step 6: Fundamental assessment — Negative PE (-0.83), negative ROA (-1.37%), extreme negative net margin (-429.43%), 4 consecutive quarters of negative EPS; no visible path to profitability; private placement is dilutive financing, not value creation
Step 7: Macro regime context — Overheat/Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2); equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution; unfavorable backdrop for speculative biotech

Step 8: Conviction assessment — Medium confidence due to missing fundamental data and incomplete alt-data adapters; however, evidence coherence is sufficient: surge exhaustion + narrative-vs-evidence divergence + structural absence + negative fundamentals all point in same direction (bear thesis)
Step 9: Position sizing (§4.8) — NEW surge_short entry: position_size_pct = 0.005 (0.5%) per mechanical rule; no override needed; sleeve cap headroom = 10% - 0.5% = 9.5% remaining
Step 10: Decision finalization — decision=short, position_size_pct=0.005, execution_plan.order_type='T+1 next-open', execution_plan.side='sell_to_open', execution_plan.size_pct_of_portfolio=0.005
Step 11: Audit record populated with rule_version, frozen_rules_file, agent_prompt_version, evidence_packet_hash
